title: Azure Document Intelligence 1.0.2 · prebuilt-layout options
description: Options verified against azure-ai-documentintelligence 1.0.2 and service API 2024-11-30. Locked and unavailable upstream choices remain visible for inspection.

modelId.title: Model
modelId.description: Azure accepts prebuilt and custom model IDs. This component is a reviewed prebuilt-layout profile so its normalizer and evidence contract stay deterministic.

availability.reason: Locked by this component profile; other Azure models require their own profile and normalization review.

apiVersion.title: Service API version
apiVersion.description: The pinned SDK defaults to the 2024-11-30 generally available service API.

availability.reason: Pinned with azure-ai-documentintelligence 1.0.2 for reproducible runs.

pages.title: Pages
pages.description: Optional 1-based page numbers and ranges, for example 1-3,5,7-9. Empty means every page.

locale.title: OCR locale hint
locale.description: Optional BCP 47 hint. Auto detection is recommended unless the document language is known; any service-supported locale can be entered.

stringIndexType.title: String offset unit
stringIndexType.description: Controls how service spans count characters. The Python normalizer slices strings by Unicode code point.

x-parser-arena.disabledReason: The current Python normalizer cannot safely slice grapheme-cluster offsets.
The current Python normalizer cannot safely slice UTF-16 offsets.

features.title: Add-on features
features.description: Optional 2024-11-30 analysis features. High resolution, formulas, font style, and query fields can add provider charges; all selected outputs are retained in the raw result.

queryFields.title: Query fields
queryFields.description: Up to 20 field labels to extract. Adding a label automatically enables the queryFields feature and can add provider charges.

outputContentFormat.title: Top-level content format
outputContentFormat.description: Azure can return text or Markdown. This component's structure normalizer consumes Markdown.

x-parser-arena.disabledReason: The current block and table normalizer requires Azure Markdown.

output.title: Additional binary outputs
output.description: Request downloadable artifacts in addition to the complete JSON and Markdown result.

x-parser-arena.disabledReason: Azure only supports searchable PDF output with prebuilt-read, not this prebuilt-layout profile.
